prestazioni: Engine swap to a **RD28T** (2.8L inline-6 turbo diesel) with forged internals: **CP Pistons 8.5:1 forged pistons**, **Manley H-beam connecting rods**, and **ACL Race Series bearings** for 500+ hp reliability. Pair with a **Garrett GTX4202R** turbo (0.82 A/R, 64mm inducer) on a **custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo manifold** (fabricated by **Diesel Performance Australia**).

Fuel system upgrade: **Bosch 044 high-flow lift pump** feeding **Siemens DEKA 80lb/hr injectors** (modified for RD28T rail pressure) with a **Link G4+ Xtreme ECU** (custom map for EGT monitoring and boost control via **AEM 30-2056 wideband O2 sensor**).

Suspension overhaul: **King Off-Road 2.5-inch Remote Reservoir Shocks** (valved for 35-inch tires) with **Poly Performance heavy-duty sway bar disconnects** and **OME HD springs** (2-inch lift). Chassis reinforcement via **Pedders GVM upgrade kit** (rated for 4,490kg) and **ARB Old Man Emu front diff drop kit** for CV angle correction.
estetica: Body-wide **Rocket Bunny Y60-specific widebody kit** (fiberglass fenders, vented hood, and rear overfenders) with **custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap** (applied by **Vinyl Lab Melbourne**).

Front end: **ARB Summit bumper** (winch-ready with **Warn Zeon 12-S Platinum**) and **HID Projector headlights** (Morimoto XB LED bulbs in **Cibie Oscar housing**). Rear: **TJM Touring Bar** with **Lightforce HTX2 200mm spotlights** and **custom rear quarter-panel vents** (for turbo/intercooler airflow).

Wheels: **Fuel Trophy 17x9 -38mm offset** (beadlock-ready) with **BFGoodrich KM3 37x12.50R17 tires**. Interior: **Sparco Pro 2000 seats** (harness-ready) with **custom roll cage** (TIG-welded by **Racefab Engineering**) and **AIM MXS Strada dash** (logging boost, EGT, and fuel pressure).
